der_note: Poisson der1=target-exp(rawApprox), der2=-exp(rawApprox) (error_functions.h:657-676; IsStoreExpApprox upstream — cb-train stores RAW approx + computes exp inline, sigmoid precedent; approx_updater_helpers.h:60-72). Tweedie der1=target*e^((1-p)*a)-e^((2-p)*a), der2=target*(1-p)*e^((1-p)*a)-(2-p)*e^((2-p)*a), p=variance_power, raw approx, exp INSIDE der, NOT exp-approx (error_functions.h:1634-1665,1644). MAPE der1=sign(target-approx)/max(1.0,|target|), der2=0 (error_functions.h:607-630; the 1.f divisor is f32-domain, Pitfall 7).
leaf_method_note: Poisson=Newton, leaf_estimation_iterations:1 PINNED (override upstream default 10, Pitfall 3). Tweedie(p=1.5)=Newton/1. MAPE=Gradient/1 (der2=0 so Newton is undefined — Pitfall 5, catboost_options.cpp:113-124).
open_q1_finding: EMPIRICAL (catboost 1.2.10, Poisson): StagedApprox(RawFormulaVal) is RAW approx (max|raw - default_pred| = 4.139828e+00 > 0 confirms staged != predict). Predictions = exp(raw): max|exp(raw) - default_pred| = 8.882e-16 (<=1e-6 confirms default predict == Exponent(raw)). staged_is_raw=True, predictions_are_exp=True. => StagedApprox oracle compares RAW; Predictions oracle applies PredictionType::Exponent (A2 / Pitfall 4).
prediction_type: Predictions = Exponent(RawFormulaVal) for Poisson (exp-link); Predictions = RawFormulaVal (raw) for Tweedie (A4)
staged_layout: flat f64: stage 0 (n_rows), then stage 1, ... ; n_iterations stages (RAW approximant, RawFormulaVal)
target_transform: y_pos = y - min(y) + 1.0 (additive shift 8.189371256914892); strictly-positive target required by Poisson/Tweedie/MAPE (min element -> 1.0). The Rust oracle reproduces the identical positive label column.
